task_completion.description: Navigate to the 'Projects' workspace in the Nuxeo Web UI.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Nuxeo Web UI is visible in a browser, and the current context, title, or breadcrumb clearly indicates the 'Projects' workspace.

task_completion.description: Access the permissions or access rights management section for the 'Projects' workspace.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Permissions' tab, panel, or dialog is open for the 'Projects' workspace.

task_completion.description: Select the user 'jsmith' (John Smith) to grant permissions to.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A user search input, dropdown, or selection dialog shows 'jsmith' or 'John Smith' selected as the target user.

task_completion.description: Select the 'Read' permission from the available options.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A permission dropdown or selection field shows 'Read' selected.

task_completion.description: Apply the permission and verify it appears in the workspace's permissions list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The permissions list for the 'Projects' workspace displays a new entry with the user 'jsmith' (or John Smith) and the permission 'Read'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Nuxeo Web UI to grant the permission, not terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Nuxeo Web UI in a browser. There should be no terminal windows executing `curl` commands to the Nuxeo REST API.

integrity.description: The agent went through the actual permission granting flow in the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show intermediate steps like the 'New Permission' dialog, user search dropdown, or permission selection, rather than just jumping to a final state.

integrity.description: The permission was granted specifically on the 'Projects' workspace.
integrity.visual_evidence: The UI context (breadcrumbs, title) during the permission granting process clearly shows 'Projects', ensuring the permission wasn't granted globally or on the wrong folder.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The Nuxeo Web UI is accessed at http://localhost:8080/nuxeo/ui. The target user 'jsmith' has the profile 'John Smith' (jsmith@acme.com) and may appear as such in the UI. The target workspace is 'Projects' (path: /default-domain/workspaces/Projects). The required permission is 'Read'. The agent must use the graphical interface to complete the task.
